시편 23:1.content: Yahweh is my shepherd: I shall lack nothing.

시편 23:2.content: He makes me lie down in green pastures. He leads me beside still waters.

시편 23:3.content: He restores my soul. He guides me in the paths of righteousness for his name’s sake.

시편 23:4.content: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for you are with me. Your rod and your staff, they comfort me.

시편 23:5.content: You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies. You anoint my head with oil. My cup runs over.

시편 23:6.content: Surely goodness and loving kindness shall follow me all the days of my life, and I will dwell in Yahweh’s house forever.
